MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Bruce C. Burge, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Jayesh Devdhara and Defendant, James Linch appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is confirmed.
